---
title: "Lecture title"
subtitle: "Applied Differential Privacy"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    scrollable: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

## First slide

Presentation deck source. A same-named blog post may exist, but offerings reference it separately.

## Animated example

A playable plot sequence on a slide. Use the on-screen **Prev / Next** buttons to step through,
or press **play** to run it at the configured frame rate. The controls are mouse-driven, so RevealJS
arrow-key slide navigation keeps working.

The frames come from a build sidecar `animations/<name>.py` (a `frames()` generator + `FPS`/`OUTPUTS`);
the build writes the player and the slide just embeds it — no imports in the deck:

```{=html}
<iframe src="../../../_generated/animations/lecture-presentations/<this-folder>/<name>.html"
        width="100%" height="430" style="border:0"
        onload="this.style.height=this.contentWindow.document.documentElement.scrollHeight+'px'"></iframe>
```

See `authoring/examples/animated-plot-sequence/` and `authoring/AUTHORING.md`.
